CommonSourceEndpoint.description: Configuration for primary and backup nodes of private origins.

Primary.description: Origin address for requests. Supports up to 5 origin fetch addresses. Required when the origin is a private bucket.

AK.description: AccessKey ID of the origin bucket. Required when using AK/SK authentication.

SK.description: SecretKey for the back-to-origin bucket. Required when using AK/SK authentication.

SKEncryptType.description:
Encryption method used for SecretKey. Values:
Empty: SecretKey is in plaintext. After receiving the SecretKey, the server will encrypt and store it.
AES256: SecretKey has been encrypted using the AES256 algorithm on the server side. After receiving the SecretKey, the server will parse and encrypt it for storage.
Note: When a back-to-origin rule is created for the first time, the SecretKey is encrypted with AES256. If you modify the back-to-origin rule without changing the SecretKey parameter, you must first decrypt the SecretKey and then re-encrypt it for storage. Therefore, when calling the PutBucketMirrorBack API to modify the back-to-origin rule and only changing other parameters (not the SecretKey), you can set SKEncryptType to AES256.

StorageVendor.description: Origin service provider. Values: BOS: Baidu Cloud. S3: Other cloud providers using the S3 storage protocol.

Condition.description: Conditions that trigger the back-to-origin function.

AllowHost.description: Supports triggering origin fetch only for specified domains. The domain must be able to access the bucket; it is recommended to use a custom domain bound to the bucket. Limit: supports up to 30 domains.

HttpCode.description: Error code that triggers origin fetch. When a download request returns this error code, origin fetch is triggered. Limit: currently only supports 404.

HttpMethod.description:
Request types that trigger back-to-origin. Value description:
["GET","HEAD"]: Both GetObject and HeadObject requests can trigger back-to-origin.
["GET"]: Only GetObject requests can trigger back-to-origin.
Default is ["GET"].

KeyPrefix.description: Object name prefix for matching origin fetch objects. Limit: supports up to 512 characters.

KeySuffix.description: Object name suffix for matching origin fetch objects. Limit: supports up to 512 characters.

CredentialProvider.description: Private back-to-origin authentication method. Required when the origin server is a private bucket.

Region.description: Region where the origin fetch bucket is located. Required when using AK/SK authentication.

Role.description: Name of AssumeRole. Only when fetching from a private TOS bucket can AssumeRole be used for authentication. Role authentication and AK/SK authentication are mutually exclusive and cannot be set simultaneously.

EndpointCredentialProvider.description: Single private origin server node and its access credentials.

BucketName.description: Name of the origin fetch bucket. Required when the origin is a private bucket.

CredentialProvider.description: Private back-to-origin authentication method. Required when the origin server is a private bucket.

Endpoint.description: Access domain name of the origin service provider, excluding bucket name, maximum length 255. Required for private buckets.

FetchHeaderToMetaDataRule.description: Mapping rules from origin response headers to object metadata.

MetaDataSuffix.description: Suffix appended when writing object metadata.

Condition.description: Conditions that trigger the back-to-origin function.

ID.description:
Rule ID. The unique identifier for the back-to-origin rule configured on the current bucket. You can set this yourself to distinguish between multiple rules. Restrictions:
Characters supported: letters, numbers, - and _.
Maximum length: 32 characters.

MirrorHeader.description: Specify the headers to include when mirroring back to origin.

Pass.description: Pass the specified headers to the origin server. Limit: up to 64.

PassAll.description: Whether to forward all HTTP headers to the origin. Values: true: forwards all HTTP headers to the origin. false: does not forward all HTTP headers to the origin. The following HTTP header types are not supported for forwarding: Host, Content-Length, Date, Authorization.

Remove.description: Prohibit forwarding specified headers to the origin. Limit: maximum 64.

Set.description: List of request headers to add or overwrite during origin fetch.

PrivateSource.description: Back-to-origin address configuration when the origin server is a private bucket.

SourceEndpoint.description: Back-to-origin address configuration when the origin server is a private bucket.

PublicSource.description: Back-to-origin address configuration when the origin server is a public bucket.

FixedEndpoint.description: Whether to always use the configured origin address.

Redirect.description: Action to execute after matching this rule.

FetchHeaderToMetaDataRules.description: List of rules for writing origin response headers to object metadata.

FetchSourceOnRedirect.description: Whether to fetch data from the configured origin after redirection. Value description: true: Fetch data from the configured origin after redirection. false: Do not fetch data from the configured origin after redirection.

FetchSourceOnRedirectWithQuery.description: Whether to include request parameters when fetching data after redirection. If not configured, inherits PassQuery settings: true: includes request parameters. false: does not include request parameters.

FollowRedirect.description: If the result of mirror origin fetch is 3xx, whether to continue redirecting to the specified Location to fetch data. Value description: true: TOS will continue to request the address corresponding to Location. false: TOS will return 302.

MirrorHeader.description: Specify the headers to include when mirroring back to origin.

PassHeaderFromSource.description: List of origin response headers allowed to be passed through directly.

PassQuery.description:
Whether to include request parameters when performing redirect or mirror back-to-origin rules. Value description:
true: Include request parameters.
false: Do not include request parameters.

PassStatusCodeFromSource.description: List of origin response status codes allowed to be passed through directly.

PrivateSource.description: Back-to-origin address configuration when the origin server is a private bucket.

PublicSource.description: Back-to-origin address configuration when the origin server is a public bucket.

RedirectType.description: Specify redirect type. Value range: Mirror: Mirror origin fetch. Async: Redirect origin fetch.

Transform.description: Define transformations for the object name when requesting the origin server.

ReplaceKeyPrefix.description: Object name prefix to be replaced when requesting the origin.

KeyPrefix.description: Object name prefix to be replaced when requesting the origin. Limit: Supports up to 512 characters.

ReplaceWith.description: Value of the object name prefix after replacement when requesting the origin. Limit: Supports up to 512 characters.

SourceEndpoint.description: Primary and secondary public origin server address configuration.

Follower.description: Origin address. Limit: Maximum length 255, supports up to 5 origin fetch addresses. When all origin fetches fail in Primary, an origin is selected from this configuration.

Primary.description: Origin address. Limit: Maximum length 255, supports up to 5 origin fetch addresses.

Transform.description: Define transformations for the object name when requesting the origin server.

ReplaceKeyPrefix.description: Object name prefix to be replaced when requesting the origin.

WithKeyPrefix.description: Prefix added before the object name when requesting the origin server. Limit: up to 512 characters.

WithKeySuffix.description: Prefix added before the object name when requesting the origin server. Limit: up to 512 characters.

description: Configure origin fetch rules for the specified TOS bucket. When an object request meets the specified conditions, TOS can fetch the object from a public or private origin according to the rules.

Bucket.description: Bucket name requiring origin fetch rule configuration.

Rules.description: Array of origin fetch policy rules.
